title: Fix UpdateUserInput type and add error logging to fire-and-forget notification inserts
problem: 1) UpdateUserInput uses confusing Partial<Omit<CreateUserInput, never>> which is just Partial<CreateUserInput>. 2) joinSession/leaveSession notification inserts use .then() with no args, silently swallowing errors. 3) markNotificationAsRead has zero error handling.
goal: Clean up types and add minimal error logging to fire-and-forget operations
acceptance_criteria: joinSession/leaveSession notification inserts log errors via console.warn
risk: low — type alias simplification + adding console.warn to fire-and-forget
